response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff/Senior Software Engineer with strong distributed systems and backend experience, but he lacks the executive leadership background required for a CTO role. He does not meet the hard requirements of having 5+ years of senior technical leadership, a track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, or deep production experience architecting complex, stateful multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes fintech environments.
strengths: Strong background in high-throughput distributed systems and microservices, having handled millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Prior exposure to the fintech sector through development work on investment platforms at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience, including scaling teams, managing outsourced governance, and board-level communication.
Missing extensive production experience architecting complex, stateful multi-agent AI systems beyond recent infrastructure tooling.
No demonstrated experience designing algorithmic working-capital allocation, real-time credit-risk models, or fintech compliance infrastructure.
